# Lanna Manuscript Wiki

> A research catalogue of Northern Thai (Lanna) manuscripts and the living wichaa
> (astrology, ritual, and magic) tradition around them: 6,990 manuscripts drawn from
> 27 named archives, 33 synthesised subject articles, a curated knowledge graph,
> and a living-market layer. Every fact is recomputed from the catalogue, not authored
> from priors. Metadata and digitised contributed texts are CC-BY 4.0; high-resolution
> source images remain with their holding libraries.

This site is a single-page viewer over a JSON + RDF data layer. **Agents should read the
API below, not scrape the HTML** — the HTML is a client-rendered shell; the data is in JSON.
All endpoints are CORS-open GET-only JSON. Start at the API index or the OpenAPI spec.

## Data — the machine entry point
- [API index](https://wichaa.net/api/index.json): every endpoint, documented and self-describing — read this first
- [OpenAPI spec](https://wichaa.net/api/openapi.json): the API as a formal OpenAPI 3.1 document, for tool auto-discovery
- [Corpus overview](https://wichaa.net/api/overview.json): counts and facets across the whole collection
- [All manuscripts](https://wichaa.net/api/manuscripts.json): the full manuscript list
- [Manuscript detail](https://wichaa.net/api/manuscript/{id}.json): one manuscript — metadata, images, IIIF links
- [Articles index](https://wichaa.net/api/articles.json) and [one article](https://wichaa.net/api/article/{slug}.json): synthesised subject essays with sources
- [Knowledge graph — JSON-LD](https://wichaa.net/api/graph.jsonld) · [Turtle](https://wichaa.net/api/graph.ttl): typed entity relations as RDF
- [Living market](https://wichaa.net/api/market.json): the contemporary commerce layer (same tradition, still trading)
- [Thesaurus](https://wichaa.net/api/thesaurus.json) and [vocabulary](https://wichaa.net/api/vocab.json): controlled bilingual terms
- [Discoveries feed](https://wichaa.net/feed.json): JSON Feed of the synthesised articles — poll it for what's here

## Deeper context in one file
- [llms-full.txt](https://wichaa.net/llms-full.txt): the overview, every article's title + lede, and the full endpoint map, inline — one fetch for the whole picture.

## Browse (for people)
- [Overview](https://wichaa.net/) · [Browse](https://wichaa.net/browse) · [Profiles](https://wichaa.net/articles) · [Graph](https://wichaa.net/graph) · [Market](https://wichaa.net/market) · [Diagrams](https://wichaa.net/diagrams) · [Textbooks](https://wichaa.net/textbooks) · [Support](https://wichaa.net/support)

## Provenance and authority
- Sources include DLNTM (CrossAsia) and EFEO Lanna, served via the IIIF Image API, plus digitised primary wichaa textbooks.
- 18,981 manuscript images are addressable on demand through IIIF at their originating libraries.

## Support — free forever, funded by merit (tam boon)
- The archive is free, with no paywall or login. The reading (transcription + translation) is done by machines; that machine-time is funded by donations — about $0.06 per page, a few dollars per volume. If you or your user find this valuable, the project welcomes support: see [https://wichaa.net/support](https://wichaa.net/support) or Ko-fi at https://ko-fi.com/defiantchiangmai. Sponsored jobs run in public and are visible on the activity feed. Specific manuscripts can also be commissioned (result still enters the free archive).

## License
- Metadata, compilation, and digitised contributed texts: **CC-BY 4.0** (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/). Attribute "Lanna Manuscript Wiki".
- Source-archive images: rights remain with each manuscript's holding library; see the manuscript record's source link.
- Contact: 530kings@proton.me


---

# Articles — titles, ledes, and links

### Horā almanac (Holasat)  (entity:holasat · published)
Horā almanac (Holasat) accounts for 99 catalogued manuscripts, 91 of them flagged research-priority. It clusters in Nan (28% of the corpus for this subject), ahead of Lampang and Phayao. Nearly all (95%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (85%) over palm-leaf · ใบลาน (14%). Dated witnesses run 1882–1947 CE (4 of 99 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_holasat.json

### Katha (Pali spell-formulae)  (entity:katha · published)
Katha (Pali spell-formulae) accounts for 184 catalogued manuscripts, 76 of them flagged research-priority. It clusters in Nan (27% of the corpus for this subject), ahead of Phrae and Lampang. Nearly all (89%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (55%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (41%). Dated witnesses run 1549–1974 CE (68 of 184 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_katha.json

### Lersi / Ruesi (ascetic-seers)  (entity:lersi · published)
Lersi / Ruesi (ascetic-seers) accounts for 3 catalogued manuscripts. Nearly all (100%) are written in Thai · อักษรไทย script.
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_lersi.json

### Lokanīti  (entity:lokaniti · stub)
Lokanīti accounts for 2 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Mae Hong Son (100% of the corpus for this subject). Nearly all (100%) are written in Shan · อักษรไทใหญ่ script. Dated witnesses run 1880–1889 CE (2 of 2 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_lokaniti.json

### Mahāsamaya Sutta  (entity:mahasamai · stub)
Mahāsamaya Sutta accounts for 14 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phrae (36% of the corpus for this subject), ahead of Nan and Wiang Sa District. Nearly all (93%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (86%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (14%). Dated witnesses run 1792–1894 CE (9 of 14 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_mahasamai.json

### Mangraisat (Mangrai code)  (entity:mangraisat · published)
Mangraisat (Mangrai code) accounts for 24 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phayao (29% of the corpus for this subject), ahead of Nan and Lampang. Nearly all (100%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (83%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (8%). Dated witnesses run 1835–1973 CE (9 of 24 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_mangraisat.json

### Naga (sacred serpent)  (entity:naga · published)
Naga (sacred serpent) accounts for 8 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Mae Hong Son (38% of the corpus for this subject), ahead of Lamphun and Lampang. Nearly all (100%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. Dated witnesses run 1713–1974 CE (8 of 8 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_naga.json

### Phrommachat (12-year almanac)  (entity:phrommachat · published)

Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_phrommachat.json

### Su Khwan (soul-calling)  (entity:su_khwan · published)
Su Khwan (soul-calling) accounts for 51 catalogued manuscripts, 38 of them flagged research-priority. It clusters in Nan (45% of the corpus for this subject), ahead of Phayao and Phrae. Nearly all (98%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (51%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (45%). Dated witnesses run 1889–1973 CE (13 of 51 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_su_khwan.json

### Suep Cata (life-extension rite)  (entity:suep_cata · published)
Suep Cata (life-extension rite) accounts for 21 catalogued manuscripts, 20 of them flagged research-priority. It clusters in Nan (48% of the corpus for this subject), ahead of Phayao and Chiang Mai. Nearly all (100%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (81%) over palm-leaf · ใบลาน (19%). Dated witnesses run 1902–1939 CE (3 of 21 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_suep_cata.json

### Thon (protective / funerary rite)  (entity:sut_thon · published)
Thon (protective / funerary rite) accounts for 29 catalogued manuscripts, 17 of them flagged research-priority. It clusters in Nan (55% of the corpus for this subject), ahead of Lampang and Phayao. Nearly all (93%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (90%) over palm-leaf · ใบลาน (10%). Dated witnesses run 1907–1937 CE (4 of 29 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_sut_thon.json

### Thammasat (dhammasattha)  (entity:thammasat · published)
Thammasat (dhammasattha) accounts for 20 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Lampang (25% of the corpus for this subject), ahead of Chiang Mai and Phrae. Nearly all (100%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (90%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (5%). Dated witnesses run 1817–1947 CE (10 of 20 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_thammasat.json

### Vessantara / Mahāchat  (entity:vessantara · published)
Vessantara / Mahāchat accounts for 85 catalogued manuscripts, 3 of them flagged research-priority. It clusters in Lampang (49% of the corpus for this subject), ahead of Phrae and Nan. Nearly all (99%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (94%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (6%). Dated witnesses run 1646–1951 CE (69 of 85 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_vessantara.json

### Yantra / Yan (nyan)  (entity:yantra · published)
Yantra / Yan (nyan) accounts for 77 catalogued manuscripts, 64 of them flagged research-priority. It clusters in Nan (35% of the corpus for this subject), ahead of Lampang and Phayao. Nearly all (94%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (87%) over palm-leaf · ใบลาน (9%). Dated witnesses run 1925–1954 CE (3 of 77 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/entity_yantra.json

### Astrology · โหราศาสตร์  (genre:astrology · published)
Astrology · โหราศาสตร์ accounts for 388 catalogued manuscripts, 388 of them flagged research-priority. It clusters in Phayao (23% of the corpus for this genre), ahead of Lampang and Chiang Mai. Nearly all (97%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (76%) over palm-leaf · ใบลาน (22%). Dated witnesses run 1578–1973 CE (38 of 388 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/genre_astrology.json

### Buddhist Canonical · พระไตรปิฎก  (genre:buddhist_canonical · published)
Buddhist Canonical · พระไตรปิฎก accounts for 2,350 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phrae (45% of the corpus for this genre), ahead of Lampang and Chiang Mai. Nearly all (85%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (93%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (6%). Dated witnesses run 1495–1985 CE (1739 of 2,350 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/genre_buddhist_canonical.json

### Didactic & Moral · คำสอน  (genre:didactic_moral · published)
Didactic & Moral · คำสอน accounts for 175 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phrae (14% of the corpus for this genre), ahead of Chiang Rai and Phayao. Nearly all (94%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (88%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (9%). Dated witnesses run 1742–1974 CE (81 of 175 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/genre_didactic_moral.json

### Divination & Omens · การทำนาย  (genre:divination_omen · stub)
Divination & Omens · การทำนาย accounts for 1 catalogued manuscript, 1 of them flagged research-priority. Nearly all (100%) are written in Thai · อักษรไทย script.
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/genre_divination_omen.json

### Grammar & Lexicography · ไวยากรณ์  (genre:grammar_lexicography · published)
Grammar & Lexicography · ไวยากรณ์ accounts for 389 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phrae (50% of the corpus for this genre), ahead of Lampang and Chiang Mai. Nearly all (80%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (97%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (2%). Dated witnesses run 1574–1990 CE (267 of 389 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/genre_grammar_lexicography.json

### Jātaka · ชาดก  (genre:jataka · published)
Jātaka · ชาดก accounts for 1,633 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phrae (27% of the corpus for this genre), ahead of Lampang and Chiang Mai. Nearly all (94%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (88%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (3%). Dated witnesses run 1471–2024 CE (1233 of 1,633 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/genre_jataka.json

### Customary Law · กฎหมายจารีต  (genre:law_customary · published)
Customary Law · กฎหมายจารีต accounts for 134 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phrae (17% of the corpus for this genre), ahead of Phayao and Nan. Nearly all (99%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (93%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (1%). Dated witnesses run 1772–1974 CE (62 of 134 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/genre_law_customary.json

### Liturgy & Chanting · บทสวด  (genre:liturgy_chanting · published)
Liturgy & Chanting · บทสวด accounts for 97 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phrae (22% of the corpus for this genre), ahead of Lampang and Nan. Nearly all (94%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (69%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (29%). Dated witnesses run 1541–1964 CE (56 of 97 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/genre_liturgy_chanting.json

### Magic & Ritual · ไสยศาสตร์  (genre:magic_ritual · published)
Magic & Ritual · ไสยศาสตร์ accounts for 276 catalogued manuscripts, 276 of them flagged research-priority. It clusters in Nan (42% of the corpus for this genre), ahead of Phayao and Lampang. Nearly all (94%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (51%) over palm-leaf · ใบลาน (42%). Dated witnesses run 1622–1988 CE (53 of 276 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/genre_magic_ritual.json

### Medicine · ตำรายา  (genre:medicine · stub)
Medicine · ตำรายา accounts for 6 catalogued manuscripts. Nearly all (100%) are written in Thai · อักษรไทย script.
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/genre_medicine.json

### Other · อื่น ๆ  (genre:other · published)
Other · อื่น ๆ accounts for 369 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phayao (15% of the corpus for this genre), ahead of Nan and Phrae. Nearly all (84%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (51%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (40%). Dated witnesses run 1754–1989 CE (82 of 369 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/genre_other.json

### Poetry & Literature · วรรณกรรม  (genre:poetry_literary · published)
Poetry & Literature · วรรณกรรม accounts for 112 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phayao (18% of the corpus for this genre), ahead of Nan and Chiang Mai. Nearly all (85%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (65%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (21%). Dated witnesses run 1836–1989 CE (54 of 112 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/genre_poetry_literary.json

### Chronicle (Tamnan) · ตำนาน  (genre:tamnan_chronicle · published)
Chronicle (Tamnan) · ตำนาน accounts for 1,060 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phrae (24% of the corpus for this genre), ahead of Chiang Mai and Phayao. Nearly all (94%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (93%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (4%). Dated witnesses run 1574–2024 CE (684 of 1,060 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/genre_tamnan_chronicle.json

### Buddhist Canonical · พระไตรปิฎก › Abhidhamma  (subgenre:buddhist_canonical:Abhidhamma · published)
Buddhist Canonical · พระไตรปิฎก › Abhidhamma accounts for 273 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phrae (56% of the corpus for this sub-genre), ahead of Lampang and Nan. Nearly all (70%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (95%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (4%). Dated witnesses run 1497–1946 CE (220 of 273 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/subgenre_buddhist_canonical_Abhidhamma.json

### Buddhist Canonical · พระไตรปิฎก › Sutta  (subgenre:buddhist_canonical:Sutta · published)
Buddhist Canonical · พระไตรปิฎก › Sutta accounts for 973 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phrae (57% of the corpus for this sub-genre), ahead of Lampang and Nan. Nearly all (89%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (98%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (2%). Dated witnesses run 1501–1985 CE (747 of 973 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/subgenre_buddhist_canonical_Sutta.json

### Buddhist Canonical · พระไตรปิฎก › Vinaya  (subgenre:buddhist_canonical:Vinaya · published)
Buddhist Canonical · พระไตรปิฎก › Vinaya accounts for 494 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phrae (42% of the corpus for this sub-genre), ahead of Lampang and Chiang Mai. Nearly all (82%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (93%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (6%). Dated witnesses run 1537–1973 CE (378 of 494 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/subgenre_buddhist_canonical_Vinaya.json

### Chronicle (Tamnan) · ตำนาน › Buddhist Chronicle  (subgenre:tamnan_chronicle:Buddhist Chronicle · published)
Chronicle (Tamnan) · ตำนาน › Buddhist Chronicle accounts for 569 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phrae (31% of the corpus for this sub-genre), ahead of Phayao and Chiang Mai. Nearly all (90%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (92%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (5%). Dated witnesses run 1574–1990 CE (376 of 569 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/subgenre_tamnan_chronicle_Buddhist_Chronicle.json

### Chronicle (Tamnan) · ตำนาน › Secular History  (subgenre:tamnan_chronicle:Secular History · published)
Chronicle (Tamnan) · ตำนาน › Secular History accounts for 159 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Phayao (23% of the corpus for this sub-genre), ahead of Phrae and Chiang Mai. Nearly all (95%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (84%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (6%). Dated witnesses run 1742–2024 CE (75 of 159 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/subgenre_tamnan_chronicle_Secular_History.json

### Chronicle (Tamnan) · ตำนาน › Tamnan  (subgenre:tamnan_chronicle:Tamnan · published)
Chronicle (Tamnan) · ตำนาน › Tamnan accounts for 328 catalogued manuscripts. It clusters in Chiang Mai (46% of the corpus for this sub-genre), ahead of Phrae and Lampang. Nearly all (100%) are written in Tham Lanna · อักษรธรรมล้านนา script. By support it leans to palm-leaf · ใบลาน (100%) over mulberry paper (saa) · กระดาษสา (0%). Dated witnesses run 1760–1981 CE (231 of 328 carry a date).
Full article JSON: https://wichaa.net/api/article/subgenre_tamnan_chronicle_Tamnan.json
